title: Craftable Nautilus Armour Recipe
description: A Mod/Datapack that lets you craft Nautilus armour!!! No need to explore anymore to search Nautilus armour.
body:
# **Craftable Nautilus Armour Recipe**

The name says it all, you dont need to wonder around between shipwrecks and other loot tables to search the rare Nautilus armours as now you can just craft them yourself.

_The Recipes are pretty simple and makes sense.
Check the Recipes from the Gallery._
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

---

**🔧 Supported Versions**
- 1.21.11

- - -

### 📦 **Installation**

1. Download the correct version ZIP.
2. Place it inside your world folder:
   `world/datapacks/`
3. Start the world (or run `/reload`).
4. Enjoy styling your Copper Golems!


**You are more than welcome to include my mod/datpacks/resourpacks in you _MODPACKS_**


  ---

### **🧑‍🎨 **Created By:** *Mcaura***
